Patch Requests
Patch Requests
The Plumas County Sheriff’s Office (PCSO) regularly receives requests for official agency-branded badges, patches, challenge coins, apparel, and more. While we appreciate all requests, we cannot always accommodate them. The Plumas County Sheriffs Employee's Association has agreed to assist us with these requests. For patches we kindly request you submit your request via mail and include the following:
Your request for a patch
A pre-addressed and stamped return envelope
Payment in the amount of $3 to the Plumas County Sheriffs Employee's Association to cover the cost of the patch
You can mail patch requests to:
PCSO
Attn: Deputy Peay
1400 E Main Street
Quincy, CA 95971
